query:
-- 1. Contratos do mês atual com VGV por corretor
SELECT u.name as corretor, COUNT(c.id) as contratos, SUM(c.valor_imovel) as vgv
FROM contratos c
JOIN users u ON c.corretor_id = u.id
WHERE MONTH(c.created_at) = MONTH(CURDATE()) AND YEAR(c.created_at) = YEAR(CURDATE())
GROUP BY u.id, u.name
ORDER BY contratos DESC, vgv DESC
LIMIT 15;

-- 2. Totais gerais de leads por status
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as total FROM leads WHERE na_lixeira = 0 GROUP BY status ORDER BY total DESC;

-- 3. Total de corretores ativos
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_corretores FROM users WHERE role = 'corretor';

-- 4. Metas mensais configuradas
SELECT mes, ano, meta_vgv, meta_contratos FROM metas_globais ORDER BY ano DESC, mes DESC LIMIT 6;

-- 5. VGV e contratos realizados por mês (últimos 6 meses)
SELECT MONTH(created_at) as mes, YEAR(created_at) as ano, COUNT(*) as contratos, SUM(valor_imovel) as vgv
FROM contratos
GROUP BY YEAR(created_at), MONTH(created_at)
ORDER BY ano DESC, mes DESC
LIMIT 6;

-- 1. Contratos do mês atual com VGV por corretor
SELECT u.name as corretor, COUNT(c.id) as contratos, SUM(c.valor_imovel) as vgv
FROM contratos c
JOIN users u ON c.corretor_id = u.id
WHERE MONTH(c.created_at) = MONTH(CURDATE()) AND YEAR(c.created_at) = YEAR(CURDATE())
GROUP BY u.id, u.name
ORDER BY contratos DESC, vgv DESC
LIMIT 15;

-- 2. Totais gerais de leads por status
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as total FROM leads WHERE na_lixeira = 0 GROUP BY status ORDER BY total DESC;

-- 3. Total de corretores ativos
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_corretores FROM users WHERE role = 'corretor';

-- 4. Metas mensais configuradas
SELECT mes, ano, meta_vgv, meta_contratos FROM metas_globais ORDER BY ano DESC, mes DESC LIMIT 6;

-- 5. VGV e contratos realizados por mês (últimos 6 meses)
SELECT MONTH(created_at) as mes, YEAR(created_at) as ano, COUNT(*) as contratos, SUM(valor_imovel) as vgv
FROM contratos
GROUP BY YEAR(created_at), MONTH(created_at)
ORDER BY ano DESC, mes DESC
LIMIT 6;
